Impact Statements.statement: Executed a seamless migration of a legacy Shark bite victims database to AWS server, optimizing storage and database performance.
Leveraged the extensive functionalities of the D3.js framework to create comprehensive data visualizations based on shark attacks and geolocations.
Employed Splunk for monitoring and analytics, providing valuable insights and enhancing system performance.
Designed a fully functional web application to retrieve files from Amazon S3 buckets, enabling efficient real-time traffic monitoring by streamlining sensor data for over 100 traffic intersections.
Employed a high-availability deployment strategy using Nginx and Docker services on AWS, ensuring 0 downtime and seamless updates across multiple cluster nodes.

industry_standards.description: Understanding of cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud, with AWS being highly valued.
Certification and experience in designing and deploying scalable systems on AWS.
Experience with Docker and Kubernetes for deploying and managing applications.
Skills in real-time data processing and batch processing frameworks.
Proficiency in tools like D3.js, Tableau, or Power BI for creating insightful visualizations.
Experience with systems that monitor and analyze network traffic.
Skills in optimizing system performance and ensuring high availability.
Knowledge of front-end and back-end technologies for building web applications.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills to address complex technical challenges.
Ability to adapt to new technologies and changing environments.
Experience with database migration and management, including SQL and NoSQL databases.
Understanding of network protocols, security practices, and tools like Nginx.
Experience with Splunk for monitoring and analyzing machine-generated data.

missing_skills.description: Experience with Kubernetes for container orchestration.
Familiarity with other cloud platforms besides AWS.
Knowledge of security protocols and best practices in cloud and web environments.
Experience with continuous integration and continuous deployment tools and practices.
Basic understanding of machine learning concepts and tools.
Experience with Agile development practices and tools like Scrum or Kanban.
